description: Noland Arbaugh, the first recipient of Neuralink's brain implant, celebrated 100 days of using the device.  Paralyzed since 2016, he now controls a MacBook and plays World of Warcraft solely with his thoughts. Arbaugh described the experience as "science fiction that somehow became my everyday reality," highlighting newfound independence and a transformed life.

Investor sentiment continues to weaken amid escalating tensions between Iran and the US, a falling rupee, and other global concerns.

title: Patriots eye $90M WR backup plan if AJ Brown trade fails
description: The New England Patriots are actively pursuing a top-tier wide receiver, with A.J. Brown being the primary target. However, if a deal for Brown falters, the team is reportedly considering a bold trade move for veteran Tyreek Hill. This strategy aligns with coach Mike Vrabel's approach, aiming to provide immediate support for quarterback Drake Maye.

title: Brewers target $38.5M Red Sox star after Mets trade shake-up
description: Milwaukee Brewers traded Freddy Peralta and Tobias Myers to the New York Mets for prospects Jett Williams and Brandon Sproat. This move creates a rotation opening in Milwaukee, potentially leading them to sign free agent Lucas Giolito for short-term pitching depth. The Brewers gain controllable talent, while the Mets bolster their starting rotation.

title: Braves explore $340M Padres superstar amid outfield concerns
description: Atlanta Braves are reportedly eyeing San Diego Padres star Fernando Tatis Jr. ahead of the 2026 season.  A potential trade package includes outfielder Mike Yastrzemski and promising prospects Didier Fuentes, Owen Murphy, and Diego Tornes. This move aims to bolster Atlanta's outfield and lineup, while San Diego could gain valuable young talent and salary relief.
